selection.selection_note: 24 repaired rows from owned_repair_batch16.json; judge compares repaired Helm candidate against semantic_brief plus OpenCPN/S-101/AquaMap refs where available.

verdicts.expected: BOYCON74 is conical buoy,gw,full-chart. Required geometry: conical/nun buoy body. Required colours: green, white, green, white, green.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate restores the class, conical silhouette, and required band order for this visual rerun. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Conical/nun buoy now has the required green-white-green-white-green bands clipped inside the cone with no external scaffolding.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: CAIRNS01 is cairn, full-chart and simplified. Required geometry: cairn beacon; required colour family is brown/reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate reads as the cairn beacon class and matches the OpenCPN/S-101 stacked-stone witness closely enough for rerun pass. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Brown three-lobe cairn stack with small base mark replaces the placeholder diamond.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: CAIRNS11 is conspicuous cairn. Required geometry: cairn beacon. Required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate preserves the conspicuous black cairn class and stack/base silhouette for visual rerun. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Black conspicuous cairn stack with three lobes and base mark replaces the placeholder.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: CTNARE51 is boundary of area with a specific caution. Required geometry: magenta caution-note/exclamation marker from strongest references.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate matches the caution-note symbol class and marker geometry; no final approval claimed. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Magenta caution-note circle with exclamation mark replaces the dashed area placeholder.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: CTYARE51 is boundary of area to be navigated with caution. Required geometry: magenta caution-note/exclamation marker from strongest references.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate matches the caution-area marker class and silhouette for visual rerun. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Magenta caution-note circle with exclamation mark replaces the dashed box/plus placeholder.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: CURENT01 is non-tidal current. Required geometry: straight current arrow/barb silhouette matching strongest S-101/OpenCPN witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate still diverges from the stronger reference silhouette. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a curved current swirl/barb pair, while S-101/OpenCPN show a straight vertical current arrow with lower branching barbs.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the straight vertical current arrow with lower branching barbs; remove the curved secondary stroke.

verdicts.expected: DAYSQR21 is square or rectangular daymark, paper chart. Required geometry and colours are reference-defined from S-101/OpenCPN.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate substitutes the wrong colour/detail family for the paper-chart daymark. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a white square with black cross/stem, but S-101/OpenCPN show a provider-coloured daymark panel on stem/ring and not the invented black cross.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw to the provider-coloured square/rectangular daymark on stem with the reference base/ring detail; remove the black cross and white-panel substitution.

verdicts.expected: DIRBOY01 is direction of buoyage. Required geometry: approach arrow/body with paired side circles.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate preserves the direction-of-buoyage class and required auxiliary marks for rerun pass. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Direction-of-buoyage arrow with paired neutral side circles is present; scale/stroke differs but symbol class and auxiliary marks are restored.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: DIRBOYA1 is direction and color of buoyage for approaching harbour in IALA region A (red to port).
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate restores the required red-left/green-right colour order and side-circle structure. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Direction-of-buoyage cue has the required arrow/body plus red-left and green-right side circles for IALA region A.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: DIRBOYB1 is direction and color of buoyage for approaching harbour in IALA region B (green to port).
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate restores the required green-left/red-right colour order and side-circle structure. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Direction-of-buoyage cue has the required arrow/body plus green-left and red-right side circles for IALA region B.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: DISMAR05 is cartographic symbol, distance mark 100m on river axis. Required geometry: concentric distance target; required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate restores the black concentric distance-mark silhouette for visual rerun. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Black concentric distance target mark replaces the placeholder diamond. Scale is larger than the tiny OpenCPN render but preserves the target class.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: DISMAR06 is cartographic symbol, distance mark 1km on river axis. Required geometry: concentric distance target; required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate restores the distance-mark target class; tighten native-scale legibility later if final QA requires it. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Black concentric 1 km distance target mark is present; center text is cramped at rendered size but the target class is recognizable.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: DNGHILIT is transparent danger highlight for mariner use. Required geometry: translucent red danger-highlight square/border.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate matches the danger-highlight class and colour family for rerun pass. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Translucent red square/border danger highlight replaces the black stake.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: DOMES001 is dome. Required geometry: curved dome silhouette with base marker; colour reference-defined/brown.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate restores the dome class and reference silhouette. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Brown dome silhouette with curved top, base line, and base marker matches the dome witness.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: DOMES011 is conspicuous dome. Required geometry: black curved dome silhouette with base marker.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate restores the conspicuous black dome class and silhouette. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Black conspicuous dome silhouette with curved top, base line, and base marker matches the conspicuous dome witness.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: DWRUTE51 is boundary of a deep water route. Required geometry: magenta vertical double-headed route arrow.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate matches the deep-water-route boundary marker for visual rerun. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Magenta vertical double-headed route arrow replaces the dashed box/plus placeholder.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: EBBSTR01 is ebb stream, rate at spring tides. Required geometry: stream-rate arrow matching S-101/OpenCPN orientation.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate inverts the reference direction. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate points downward with a crossbar, but both S-101/source-priority and OpenCPN witnesses show an upward stream arrow for this row.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the upward stream-rate arrow/barb silhouette from S-101/OpenCPN; do not invert the arrow.

verdicts.expected: ERBLTIK1 is range mark for an ERBL. Required geometry: orange dashed range arc.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate preserves the ERBL range-arc class and dashed line pattern. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Orange dashed range arc is restored and matches the ERBL range-tick witness in class, colour, and line pattern.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: FAIRWY51 is fairway with one-way traffic in direction indicated. Required geometry: one-way fairway directional arrow matching strongest witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate uses the wrong orientation, colour family, and arrow style. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a horizontal magenta arrow with extra horizontal ticks, while S-101/OpenCPN show a vertical outlined one-way fairway arrow.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the vertical outlined one-way fairway arrow from S-101/OpenCPN; remove the horizontal magenta arrow/tick substitution.

verdicts.expected: FAIRWY52 is fairway with two-way traffic. Required geometry: two-way fairway directional arrow matching strongest witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate uses the wrong orientation, colour family, and arrow style. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a horizontal magenta two-headed arrow, while S-101/OpenCPN show a vertical outlined two-way fairway arrow.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the vertical outlined two-way fairway arrow from S-101/OpenCPN; remove the horizontal magenta double-arrow substitution.

verdicts.expected: FLDSTR01 is flood stream, rate at spring tides. Required geometry: flood-stream arrow/rate barb matching S-101/OpenCPN.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate keeps the broad direction but misses the load-bearing rate/barb shape. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is an upward arrow but uses two horizontal crossbars instead of the S-101/OpenCPN flood-stream side-barb/rate silhouette.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw with the S-101/OpenCPN upward flood-stream arrow and side-barb/rate cue; remove the double horizontal crossbars.

verdicts.expected: FLGSTF01 is flagstaff, flagpole. Required geometry and colours are reference-defined from S-101/OpenCPN.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is a generic flag rather than the chart flagstaff symbol. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black pole with white flag and no reference base/ring, while S-101/OpenCPN use the brown/gold flagstaff form with base/leader detail.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the brown/gold flagstaff/flagpole witness with the reference flag shape and base/ring detail; remove the black/white generic flag substitution.

verdicts.expected: FOULGND1 is foul area of seabed safe for navigation but not for anchoring. Required geometry: open foul-ground hash/slash mark.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate still risks confusion by inventing a boxed symbol instead of the open foul-ground hash. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate adds a boxed star/grid enclosure, while S-101/OpenCPN foul ground is an open hash/slash mark without the enclosing square.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the open foul-ground hash/slash reference mark; remove the enclosing square and radial star-like structure.

verdicts.expected: INFORM01 is additional information available by cursor query. Required geometry: information glyph/box with leader/origin structure matching strongest witness.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate omits the leader/origin structure that identifies the chart information marker. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a standalone magenta circled i, while S-101/OpenCPN show an information box/glyph attached to a leader line and origin circle.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the reference information marker with boxed i/glyph plus leader line and origin circle; do not use a standalone circled i.
